title: Mistakenly removed our only admin

posts.author: hmichaud (Hubert Michaud)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings!

So this morning I was removing a member from our Monday platfrom and added a new one. By mistake, I changed my admin status to a viewer status. Now we dont have any admin we can’t use our platform.

I contacted the support but I would like to know if there is anything that can be done right now.

Thank you for your time!

posts.author: AronK (Aron-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hmichaud, welcome to the community and thank you for reaching out!

Can you let me know if you still need assistance with this issue or has the support team responded back to you?

If you still need some help, let me know your account URL and I can assist further from there.

-Aron

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
